name: Venafi
description: Venafi — machine identity management platform for certificates, keys, and SSH credentials at scale.

seo.title: Venafi — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Venafi: Venafi — machine identity management platform for certificates, keys, and SSH credentials at scale.

when_to_use: Machine identity lifecycle management for enterprise TLS
Certificate inventory and expiry alerting at DevOps scale
SSH key governance for privileged server access control
Code signing key management for software release pipelines
Zero-touch certificate rotation for Kubernetes workloads

pros: Strong integrations across clouds and CAs
review.verdict: If machine identity sprawl is a real cost center, Venafi is the serious option; otherwise too heavy.
review.best_for: Large enterprises managing tens of thousands of certs and keys.
review.not_for: Smaller orgs where Let's Encrypt + Vault is enough.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
